post.description:
Calculates subtotal, coupon discount, weight-based shipping, and final amount **without** placing an order.

**Logged-in customer:** pass JWT — cart is resolved automatically.

**Guest:** omit JWT and supply `customerEmail` (and optionally `customerPhone`) to resolve a cart-based preview.

Unified checkout endpoint.

**Cart checkout:** `isCartPurchase: true` (items list is ignored, cart is used).

**Direct / "buy now" checkout:** `isCartPurchase: false` + supply `items`.

**Payment methods:**
- `RAZORPAY` (default for DELIVERY) — a payment link is generated and returned in the response.
- `COD` — only allowed for PICKUP orders.

**Flow for RAZORPAY:**
1. Order is created with status `PAYMENT_PENDING`
2. Response includes `paymentLink.url` — redirect customer to this URL
3. After payment, Razorpay webhook updates order to `PENDING` (ready for fulfilment)
4. Use `GET /user/orders/:id/payment-status` to poll payment status

**Logged-in customer (JWT):** `customerName/Email/Phone` are optional.

**Guest (no JWT):** `customerEmail` is **required**.

400.description: Validation / stock / guest field missing error.

get.description:
Browse all reviews across all products.

**Filter options:**
- `productName` — search by product name
- `customerName` — search by reviewer name
- `rating` — exact rating (1–5)
- `minRating` / `maxRating` — rating range
- `isMocked` — `true` / `false`
- `sortBy` — `createdAt` (default) | `rating` | `productName`
- `sortOrder` — `desc` (default) | `asc`
- `page`, `limit`

Returns a `summary` block (total, average rating, per-star distribution) plus the paginated `data`.

• **CONFIRMED** → marks order confirmed, records confirmedBy user.
• **PACKED** → deducts stock from the selected warehouse and records packed user.
• **SHIPPED** → records shippedBy user.
• `warehouseBranchId` can be set at any point before PACKED.

- `productName` — partial product name search

- `rating` — exact rating (1–5)

- `isMocked` — `true` for dummy/mocked reviews, `false` for genuine
- `sortBy` — `createdAt` (default) | `rating` | `productName`
- `sortOrder` — `desc` (default) | `asc`
- `page`, `limit` — pagination

Response includes a `summary` block with total count, average rating, and per-star distribution.

info.title: Kingfox ERP API
info.description:
## Kingfox Clothing ERP — REST API Reference

A comprehensive backend for managing a multi-branch clothing retail business.

### 🔐 Authentication
All protected endpoints require a **Bearer JWT** token.
1. Call `POST /v1/auth/login` with your credentials
2. Copy the `access_token` from the response
3. Click **Authorize** (🔓) at the top and paste the token

### 📦 Seeded Test Credentials
| Role     | Email                    | Password       |
|----------|--------------------------|----------------|
| Admin    | admin@kingfox.com        | Admin@1234     |
| Manager  | manager1@kingfox.com     | Manager@123    |
| Staff    | staff1@kingfox.com       | Staff@123      |
| Cashier  | cashier1@kingfox.com     | Cashier@123    |

### 🏪 Seeded Branches
| ID | Name                 | Type       |
|----|----------------------|------------|
| 1  | Main Shop            | SHOP       |
| 2  | Central Warehouse    | WAREHOUSE  |
| 3  | North Branch Shop    | SHOP       |
| 4  | South Branch Shop    | SHOP       |

User phone number (required for OTP login)

branchId.description: Branch ID to assign this user to
New Branch ID to move user to

name.description: Role name — must be unique (e.g. admin, manager, staff, cashier)

text.example: Machine wash cold with like colors. Tumble dry low. Do not bleach.

slug.description: Optional SEO-friendly slug. Auto-generated from name when omitted.

description.example: Premium 100% cotton round-neck T-shirt, pre-shrunk and color-fast.

isFreeShipping.description: Whether the product is eligible for free shipping

example.title: Size Guide
example.text: Available in S, M, L, XL sizes

metaInfo.description: Array of meta information with title, text, and optional image

tagIds.description: Array of Tag IDs to associate with the product

costPrice.description: Cost price per unit at time of purchase (₹)

items.description: Line items in the purchase order

discountValue.description: Discount value — percentage (25 = 25%) or flat ₹ amount

minPurchaseAmount.description: Minimum cart value required to apply coupon (₹)

maxDiscountAmount.description: Cap on discount amount for PERCENTAGE type (₹)

usageLimit.description: Maximum number of times this coupon can be used

price.description: Selling price per unit at time of billing (₹)

customerId.description: Customer ID — omit for walk-in (cash) customers

branchId.description: Branch/Shop ID where invoice is being raised

userId.description: Cashier / staff User ID raising the invoice

tax.description: Tax percentage to apply (e.g., 18 for 18% GST)

paymentMethod.description: Payment method: CASH | UPI | CARD | CREDIT

returnType.description: INVOICE — full shop return (invoice → RETURNED) | PARTIAL_RETURN — some items returned (invoice → PARTIALLY_RETURNED) | ONLINE_ORDER — e-commerce return

items.description: Items being returned — refund amount is auto-calculated from the original invoice price

variantId.description: Variant ID being returned from the original invoice
Variant ID the customer is receiving (new item)

invoiceId.description: Original invoice ID to return items from

returnItems.description: Items being returned from the original invoice

exchangeItems.description: New items the customer is taking in exchange

paymentMethod.description: Payment method if customer needs to pay a difference: CASH | UPI | CARD | CREDIT

couponCode.description: Coupon code to apply on the exchange invoice (optional)

gstPercent.description: GST percentage to apply on the exchange bill. Defaults to 0.

description.example: Participate and win exciting prizes this summer!

totalVouchersLimit.description: Maximum total vouchers that can be issued

branchIds.description: Array of Branch IDs to associate with this campaign

priority.description: Priority for auto-assignment (lower = higher priority). Defaults to 0.

filterType.description: Filter type for auto-assignment. Set to CATEGORY with categoryIds, or TAG with tagIds. Cannot set both categoryIds and tagIds.

categoryIds.description: Category IDs to associate (only when filterType = CATEGORY)

tagIds.description: Tag IDs to associate (only when filterType = TAG)

description.example: Participate and win exciting prizes this summer!

totalVouchersLimit.description: Maximum total vouchers that can be issued

branchIds.description: Array of Branch IDs to replace (or empty to clear)

filterType.description: Filter type for auto-assignment. CATEGORY or TAG. Set to null to remove filter (campaign becomes universal fallback).

categoryIds.description: Category IDs to associate (only when filterType = CATEGORY). Empty array clears.

tagIds.description: Tag IDs to associate (only when filterType = TAG). Empty array clears.

branchId.description: Branch ID where voucher is being issued

issuedBy.description: User ID of staff issuing the voucher

invoiceId.description: Related invoice ID (if issued upon purchase)

minimumPurchaseAmount.description: Minimum purchase amount required to use this voucher

maximumPurchaseAmount.description: Maximum purchase amount this voucher can be applied to

contactPerson.description: Primary contact person at the courier company

trackingUrlTemplate.description: URL template for shipment tracking — use {tracking_id} as placeholder

isActive.description: Whether this agent is currently active

createdBy.description: User ID of the staff creating the shipment record

trackingUrl.description: Direct tracking URL for the shipment

toBranchId.description: Destination branch ID (shop receiving the stock)

quantity.description: Positive = add stock, Negative = remove stock

barcode.description: Barcode of the product to scan into the cart

gstPercent.description: GST percentage (e.g. 5 for 5%). Stored on first scan; subsequent scans use the stored value. Defaults to 0.

quantity.description: New quantity. Send 0 to remove the item entirely.

paymentMethod.description: Payment method: CASH | UPI | CARD | CREDIT

customerName.description: Required only when the phone number is new to the system

manualDiscountAmount.description: Flat manual discount amount (₹) applied by staff.

attendedByStaffId.description: ID of the shop staff member who attended this purchase.

campaignId.description: Lucky draw campaign ID from which vouchers should be issued to this customer.

voucherCount.description: Number of vouchers to issue from the selected campaign for this checkout.

branchId.description: Branch ID where the voucher is valid

customerId.description: Customer ID who owns this voucher

count.description: Number of available vouchers for this bill

vouchers.description: List of vouchers that can be applied to the current bill

variantId.description: Variant ID of the returned item
Variant ID to add to the bill

items.description: All items in the current bill — call this each time an item is added/removed

couponCode.description: Coupon code to apply a discount

gstPercent.description: GST percentage on the discounted subtotal (e.g. 5 for 5%). Defaults to 0.

price.description: Agreed selling price per unit (₹) — from preview response

customerPhone.description: Customer's mobile number — used to find or create the customer

customerName.description: Required when the phone number is new

manualDiscountAmount.description: Flat manual discount amount (₹) applied by staff.

attendedByStaffId.description: ID of the shop staff member who attended this purchase.

voucherCodes.description: Lucky draw voucher codes to redeem against this invoice.

paymentMethod.description: Payment method: CASH | UPI | CARD | CREDIT

gstPercent.description: GST percentage on the discounted subtotal. Defaults to 0.

items.description: Items being sold — use prices from /billing/preview

isCartPurchase.description: true = preview from cart, false = preview from provided items list

customerEmail.description: Guest customer email — used to resolve cart for cart-based preview when not logged in.

isCartPurchase.description: Set to `true` for a cart-based checkout (items list is ignored). Set to `false` for a direct / "buy now" checkout and provide `items`.

customerName.description: Customer full name. Required for guest checkout (no JWT). Ignored when a valid customer JWT is provided.

customerEmail.description: Customer email. Required for guest checkout (no JWT). Used to find or create the customer account.

customerPhone.description: Customer phone number. Optional for guest checkout — used as secondary lookup key.

paymentMethod.description: Payment method. RAZORPAY (default for DELIVERY) — generates a payment link. COD (Cash on Delivery) is also supported.

fulfillmentType.description: DELIVERY (default) for home delivery — requires shippingAddress. PICKUP for store pickup — requires pickupBranchId.

pickupBranchId.description: Required when fulfillmentType is PICKUP. Must be a branch with supportsPickup = true.

warehouseBranchId.description: ID of the branch fulfilling the order (usually a warehouse)

body.example: Very comfortable and true to size.

defaultCharge.description: Default shipping charge (₹) when no weight rate matches

label.description: Human-readable label for this rate band

charge.description: Shipping charge (₹) for this weight range

message.example: I placed an order 3 days ago but have not received any update.

phone.description: Customer mobile phone number to send OTP to

warehouseBranchId.description: Warehouse branch ID to fulfill from
